subcodes.first_line: O ye luminous friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! In the days of the Day-Star of the horizons, in those regions and realms, pure seeds were scattered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران نورانی عبدالبهاء در ایام نیر آفاق در آنخطه و دیار تخم پاکی افشانده
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @growth of the Cause, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @words vs deeds
